title: One Piece
description: Get ready to set sail on an adventure with this One Piece themed texture pack.
body:
# ONE PEICE 🌅 ![one piece pack](https://i.imgur.com/xVJR5jI.png)Get ready to set sail on an adventure with our One Piece themed texture pack! ### 🎞|TRAILER ![dfgdd](https://i.imgur.com/pG7zdWf.png) ### 🖼|EXAMPLE HOTBAR GUI START SCREEN ![dfgdd](https://i.imgur.com/pG7zdWf.png) ### 🗒|DESCRIPTION This pack features custom GUI elements, new hotbar, new title and background images that are inspired by the popular anime and manga series, One Piece. This pack is perfect for fans of the series or anyone looking for a unique and exciting Minecraft experience. You can use this pack in the standard Vanilla version and with Fabric. Download now and set off on an adventure with the Straw Hat Pirates! New! with this pack: - The One Piece Java Minecraft texture pack is now also available for Fabric. - The pack is playable with Fabric Loader versions 0.15.11 - 1.21. - start screen     - options - buttons        - gui          - hotbar  ![dfgdd](https://i.imgur.com/pG7zdWf.png) ### 🛈|INSTALL
VANILLA 1. Open Minecraft: Launch Minecraft and click on the "Options" button. 2. Go to the "Resource Packs" section: In the options menu, select "Resource Packs" to open the resource packs screen. 3. Move the texture pack to the correct location: Locate the folder where your Minecraft resource packs are stored. The default location is usually in the "resourcepacks" folder under your Minecraft game directory. Move the downloaded .zip file to this folder. 4. Select the texture pack in Minecraft: Back in the resource packs screen, select the texture pack that you just moved to the resource packs folder. The texture pack should now be listed in the "Selected Resource Packs" section. 5. Apply the changes: Click on the "Done" button to apply the changes and enable the texture pack. 6. Enjoy the new texture pack: Start a new game or load a saved game, and the new texture pack should now be in effect.
FABRIC 1. The latest Fabric Launcher is required for the Minecraft Fabric mod -> Fabric Loader 0.15.11-1.21 2. Update your Java. At least java 21 -> Java Oracle
![dfgdd](https://i.imgur.com/pG7zdWf.png) ### 💬|COMMUNITY (っ＾▿＾)۶🍸🌟🍺٩(˘◡˘ ) Hey, We invite you to join our Discord community where you can connect with fellow players, share your ideas, and report any bugs you encounter. Whether you have suggestions for improving the hotbar or need support with any issues, our community is here to help. Let’s build, explore, and create together! ![dfgdd](https://i.imgur.com/pG7zdWf.png) ### 💖| THX! See you in the next pack! ![znygames](https://i.imgur.com/LlNcUtP.png)
